counters.description: one of the worst matchups because her spiders counter kha isolations' try to bait elise e if you do this you have a very good chance to win the fight against her
before lvl 6 you have a good chance of killing. remember to use red trinket if it disappears from your vision and use smit  to quickly
one of the more annoying matches because of his q, it is best to enter into exchanges with him after reaching your 6th level
it's a pretty simple matchup the most important thing is jungle tracking against him, nunu likes to gank a lot, try to predict his moves and try to do counter ganks
early game is on your side so don't be afraid to trade with him
xin likes to invade often at level 3, so be careful, try bait his w if u do that u have more chances to win trades

some skarner do invade lvl 3 but not all so you have to take that into account. fights with him are not difficult but it will definitely be hard to kill him because he is quite tanky even in the early game
if master yi has ignite he will 100% invade you. before 6 you have a good chance of killing him but you have to take into account that his w is quite annoying and can be used very often,
if you want to fight him first of all, try to avoid close contact with the walls,
this is quite a specific match up, it's easy to defeat her in the early stages, but if she gains some kills, you have a slight problem due to her healing and crits
perma ban this most stupid champ right now in late game no chance vs her

synergies.description: annie is the best option for crowd control and she is really well with kha because one well stun and kha have free kills
sleep + q and if kha jumping to opponent is insta kill
irelia is one of the better options for kha, not only can she beat up opponents but she can also serve them to you on a plate very easily thanks to her e
lissandra stun on r stun on w
this pick is really good synergy with kha because many time he can give you speed so if you have feed is really good option for you
this hero gives you a lot of shields and acceleration in a very short time,
with this hero you can do so much that it's just hard to describe it all
using jax's e will help you a lot in the early game and teamfights
leona provides so much crowd control that no matter what phase of the game you have countless opportunities to get easy kills
taunt shen gives you a very easy way to get a kill + you can make a lot of good engags using his r
late game malzahar does a lot of teamfighting + can easily spot the opponent with his r which helps to easily get a kill for you or your team. his r gives you a lot of options for easy kills
tf gives you countless opportunities for kills in both early and late game. tf map control on r will help you spot potential kills with ease
anivia gives you a great opportunity for free kills thanks to her q and her w, thanks to which we can easily get free kills in tf or regular early fight

alistar has one of the better options for you during a gank, free stun on e and his combo with knockup give you very good gank opportunities + alistar is a perfect character for diving at his level 6 so don't be afraid to dive if you have him on your team
try to use the opportunities that cassio w provides, it's a perfect ability for early ganks and every tf thanks to her r gives you free kills
try to enter every tf with her ball on you + her r during your engage, fights will almost always be won
annie is the best option
sleep + q and if kha jumping to opponent is insta kill
